creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2012-05-25 15:24:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/hornetq          Makefile distinfo pkg-deinstall pkg-descr 
                         pkg-install pkg-plist 
    net/hornetq/files    hornetq.in patch-log1 patch-log2 
                         patch-run patch-stop 
  Log:
  HornetQ is an open source project to build a multi-protocol, embeddable,
  very high performance, clustered, asynchronous messaging system, designed
  with usability in mind.
  
  HornetQ is an example of Message Oriented Middleware (MoM)
  
  WWW:    http://www.jboss.org/hornetq
  
  PR:             ports/167952
  Submitted by:   Radim Kolar
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2468    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
